generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AirTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring ambient air temperature inside the chamber"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ChamberTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring chamber temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTempSensor
]

instance AirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirTempSensor
]

instance ChamberTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberTempSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from HeatbedTempSensor, calibrated using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance AirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from AirTempSensor, calibrated using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ChamberTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from ChamberTempSensor, calibrated using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChamberTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model with 2 parameters assuming uniform heat distribution and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model with 4 parameters accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares calibration of model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B used for control and data acquisition via GPIO and 1-Wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ControlService, DataTransmissionService
]

instance CustomPCBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control and actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates model parameters through non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmits sensor data from physical sensors to digital twin via RabbitMQ message broker"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionConfirmation
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors temperature in real-time for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls Heatbed and Fan based on model predictions and safety checks"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticAdjustmentAction, HumanInterventionTriggerAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in temperature sensors or heating components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system state based on sensor data and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes heating parameters using calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterOptimizationInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters using non-linear least squares"
]

instance DataTransmissionConfirmation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of successful data transmission to digital twin"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring alert triggered by temperature deviations"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in sensors or heating components"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state for thermal dynamics"
]

instance ParameterOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized heating parameters based on calibration and model predictions"
]

instance AutomaticAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heating parameters based on model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanInterventionTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger for human intervention when safety thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers to handle 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V or 24V for airflow of 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, HeatbedTempSensor, AirTempSensor, ChamberTempSensor, RaspberryPi, CustomPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed activation, fan speed) generated by the digital twin are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates the heatbed and fan through MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Components orchestrated via RabbitMQ: controller (Bang-bang control logic), low-level driver (hardware interfacing), and communication server (RabbitMQ), with data flow between physical twin and digital twin components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during the 'as operated' phase, where the digital twin integrates with the deployed physical system to monitor, predict, and optimize operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated via experimental comparison; residual error minimized using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver, with uniformity tested using three sensors to verify Assumption 1."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (AMQP protocol) over Wi-Fi/Ethernet on Raspberry Pi for communication between PT and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in low-level driver to ensure device safety during operation."
]
